title: No Turn on Red locations (Sec. TPR-96)

street.description: Street or approach the restricted traffic is on; for intersection-wide entries, the full multi-street designation as written (whitespace-collapsed, not beautified)

direction.description: Direction(s) of travel the restriction applies to; 'all' for all-directions/all-approaches entries; empty when the source states none

cross_street.description: Street at/onto/towards which the turn is prohibited; empty for intersection-wide entries or when not stated

turn.description: Which turn is prohibited on red

lane_detail.description: Lane qualifier from the source (e.g. 'left two lanes', 'far left two lanes', 'left and center lane')

condition.description: Operating condition of the sign, lowercase without parentheses (e.g. 'when illuminated')

days.description: Days the restriction applies; empty means at all times

times.description: Time window(s) the restriction applies; empty means at all times

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source (e.g. 'at exit 125', 'opposite Elm Street', 'in Newton Corner')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
